jobs.title: Cloud Architect
jobs.summary: Drive cloud architecture patterns and landing-zone standards. Partner with delivery teams to implement guardrails and compliance.
responsibilities: •	Define target cloud architecture patterns and landing-zone standards
•	Partner with security teams to implement guardrails and compliance baselines
•	 Guide migration planning (sequencing, dependencies, risk mitigation)
•	 Support delivery teams with architecture reviews and operational readiness
requirements: •	Hands-on experience with AWS or Azure architecture
•	Strong understanding of networking, IAM, logging/monitoring, and cost optimization
•	Experience designing secure cloud landing zones and governance patterns
•	Ability to translate business goals into practical technical decisions

jobs.title: ERP Project Manager
jobs.summary: Looking for an experienced ERP Project Manager with an active PMP certification.
responsibilities: •	Own delivery plan, milestones, and reporting cadence
•	Manage risks, dependencies, and escalation paths
•	Ensure documentation standards, decision logs, and handoff readiness
requirements: •	Proven ERP project delivery experience (planning → go-live)
•	Strong stakeholder management and governance execution
•	Ability to run structured status reporting and risk controls
